description: Save the Wizarding World from Lord Voldemort!

v1.0.0.description:
# Initial Release of Lego Harry Potter 5-7 Archipelago APWorld
The Wizarding World is in peril! Collect the 7 Horcruxes and defeat Voldemort!

## What items and locations are shuffled?
- Spells & Abilities
- Level Unlocks - excluding the bonus level
- Gold Bricks
- Students in Peril
- Red Bricks
- House Crest Pieces
- True Wizard
- Character Tokens
- Shop Purchases

## Required software
- An unmodified copy of the Steam or GOG release of Lego Harry Potter 5-7
  - Note this must be the original version, not the Collection version
- A copy of the APWorld (requires Archipelago version 0.6.7 or higher)
- Reloaded II Mod Loader [Link](https://reloaded-project.github.io/Reloaded-II/QuickStart)
  - Requires .NET 9.0 or higher
- The Lego Harry Potter 5-7 Archipelago Mod [Link](https://github.com/jradcode23/LHP2-Mod/releases)

See the attached setup guide and FAQ guide for instructions on how to set up the AP
v1.0.0.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description:
# Bug Fixes
- Remove Tom Riddle Orphan Playable as a progression item
- Fix Cafe logic so that it is either year 5 completed or year 6 completed
- Make Astronomy tower red brick logically require Y7 or Y8 cause of game bugs
v1.0.1.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.1

v1.0.2.description:
## Hotfix
- Fixed The Seven Harrys Slytherin Crest Logic & Gryffindor Crest Logic
- Fixed Dark Times True Wizard logic
- Fixed The Flaw in the Plan True Wizard Logic
- Fixed Kreacher Discomforts True Wizard Logic
v1.0.2.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.2

v1.0.4.description:
# Bug Fix Patch
- Starting inventory is no longer duplicated
- Fixed Lovegood Lunacy Logic
- Fixed Arthur Cardigan Logic
- Moved Cho token logic back to Y6
- Fixed A Veiled Threat Ravenclaw bug
v1.0.4.title: Lego Harry Potter 5-7 APWorld v1.0.4
